name: workflow-button-shadcn
title: Workflow Button (shadcn-native)
author: Lloyd Humphreys
description: The workflow split button composed from your app's actual shadcn <Button> and <DropdownMenu> — identical variants, sizes, theming, focus rings, and dark mode; icons, menu rows, and custom primary content are plain ReactNode. Same flow model as workflow-button: `to` transition lists as the definition, `context` for role-aware disabling/prominence, per-step `advanceVariant` emphasis, attribution `meta`, and the caret hides when nothing is reachable. Self-contained in one file.
